case_title: SALVADOR COREAS HERNANDEZ VS. RONY MORAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SALVADOR COREAS AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, RONY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SALVADOR COREAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, RONY $6,680.85 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,936.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
